walnut-pie-with-breadcrumbs-argiro.name: Walnut Pie With Breadcrumbs
instructions: Add all the solid ingredients – walnut, toast, cinnamon, clove, nutmeg, baking powder – and mix.
Beat the butter with the sugar in the mixer for 6–7' until it turns into cream and add the yolks.
Add the zest and cognac.
Add the mixture to the bowl with the solid ingredients and mix well with a spoon.
Beat the whites with salt in meringue until they form soft peaks.
Add 3 tablespoons of beaten white to the mixture and mix to dilute.
Finally, add the remaining beaten whites and gently fold the mixture with spatula.
Butter round baking pan 32 cm.
Add the mixture inside & straighten the surface.
Bake the walnut pie in a preheated oven at 170oC in air, medium grill, for 40' and let it cool well.

watermelon-pistachio-salad.name: Watermelon Pistachio Salad
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the watermelon, basil, mint, pistachios, feta, lemon zest, and orange zest.
Make the dressing: In a small bowl, whisk together the orange juice, lemon juice, olive oil, honey, pepper, and salt until evenly combined.
Pour the dressing over the watermelon salad and toss gently until well-coated.
Serve immediately, or refrigerate for 10 minutes to chill. Just before serving, divide the watermelon salad between serving bowls and drizzle with the balsamic glaze.
Enjoy!

watermelon-popsicles.name: Watermelon Popsicles
instructions: Blend watermelon, water, honey, lemon juice, and sugar together in a blender until smooth.
Pour mixture into popsicle molds and freeze until solid, about 2 hours.
Run hot water over popsicle molds for a few seconds to unmold.

white-and-almond-pie-teleculinaria.name: White And Almond Pie
instructions: Preheat the oven at 180 degrees. Line a tray with vegetable paper and grease it with butter. Reserve.
Hit the clears in a large bowl until they start to stand. Gradually add the sugar, continuing to beat until you get a firm and shiny meringue.
Spread the meringue over the vegetable paper and sprinkle with toothpicked almonds. Take it to the oven for 8 minutes. Reduce the oven temperature to 160oC and let it cook for another 15 minutes.

In the meantime, prepare the egg candy: light a pot with sugar and water and let it boil for 2 minutes. Take it out of the fire, let it cool down and then put the yolks together, stirring. Take it back to the fire, always stirring until it thickens.

Retire do forno a massa das claras e desenforme sobre uma folha de papel vegetal. Deixe arrefecer durante 10 minutos. De seguida, espalhe por cima o doce de ovos, enrole cuidadosamente em forma de torta e sirva.

whole-chicken-in-the-shell-argiro.name: Whole Chicken In The Shell

ingredients.item: Two clones. fresh thyme or combination of herbs (rigan - rosemary)
Two clones. fresh thyme or combination of herbs (rigan - rosemary)

instructions: Let the poultry first come to room temperature, at least for 30 minutes. We wipe it very well with absorbent paper.
Turn on the evening at 200°C (in residence).
Salt the chicken inside.
In bowls dissolve the honey in the liquids (balsamic, soy, lemon juice, orange juice, olive oil) and beat with a fork to unite.
Fill the chicken's belly with garlic, lemon soups and orange soups and with the herbs, tie the chicken and put it in a small pot.
Brush with minimal olive oil.
Add salt and pepper, pour it with the sweet and sour sauce, cover and baking for 1 hour and 30′. Then we control it, expresse it and let it turn a little brown and make a nice crust.
After the chicken is cooked, check with the blade of the knife the thigh (if it makes clear liquid it is cooked, if it makes pink it takes a little more cooking time).
Take the chicken out on a platter. If you want, remove the most fat sauce from the surface with a spoon and boil it in a pot for a few minutes in a strong heat to glaze and make thick blisters.

whole-grilled-fish-with-lime.name: Whole Grilled Fish With Lime

ingredients.prep: two 2 1/2-pound, or three 1 1/2-pound head-on fish, such as gray or pink snapper, black sea bass, or branzino, scaled, gutted

ingredients.item: Olive oil plus more for oiling and drizzling
Limes or 5 key limes (preferably from mexico)
ingredients.prep: thinly sliced, plus 1/4 cup fresh lime juice

instructions: Build a medium-hot fire in a charcoal grill, or heat a gas grill to high. Score fish: Cut 1 slash lengthwise down to the bone, then crosswise in 2 places, spacing apart; repeat on other side. Season fish cavity and skin with salt; drizzle fish with 1/4 cup oil. Stuff some of the lime slices (reserve a few for garnish) and herb stems inside fish.

Clean and oil grill grate well. Grill fish, resisting the urge to turn it, until skin is nicely crisp and charred and flesh is flaky and opaque down to the bone. (This can take 6–15 minutes, depending on size of fish. Don't mess around with it until it's ready.) Place a metal spatula underneath fish (a pair of metal tongs on top of fish also helps for support), then lift and gently roll over to the other side. Cook until flesh is flaky and opaque down to the bone, 6–15 minutes. Use a small knife to check for doneness; if it slides easily through the thickest part of flesh, fish is done. If not, finish cooking fish on grill or in a 450° oven.
Place fish on a serving platter; drizzle oil and lime juice over. Garnish with reserved lime slices, basil leaves, and cilantro.

winter-blossoms-often-requested-ham-sala.name: Winter Blossom's Often Requested Ham Salad
instructions: Add ham to the bowl of a food processor; pulse until finely chopped but not pasty, 6 or 7 pulses. (You may need to do this in batches.) Transfer to a large bowl; repeat with remaining ham.
Stir mayonnaise, onion, relish, and mustard into chopped ham mixture until well combined; add more mayonnaise if mixture is too dry. Chill ham salad until ready to serve.
